componentSpecs.name: AuditRepository
componentSpecs.description: Repository contract for audit persistence. Exposes create(input: CreateAuditRecordInput): Promise<AuditRecord> and findByEntity(entityType: string, entityId: string): Promise<AuditRecord[]>. All signatures use types from audit.model.ts and database access must flow through this contract.

componentSpecs.name: PostgreSqlAuditRepository
componentSpecs.description: PostgreSQL-facing repository contract/implementation conforming to AuditRepository. Persistence logic is deferred; methods remain contract-compatible and support separate audit repository operations without introducing multi-entity transactions. Canonical schema: CREATE TABLE audit_records ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, entity_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, entity_id UUID NOT NULL, action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL );

componentSpecs.name: AuditModel
componentSpecs.description: Type definitions exported from src/modules/audit/audit.model.ts including AuditRecord and CreateAuditRecordInput.
